title: Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib
tagline: Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib — heritage city of Punjab

heroImage.alt: Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib, Punjab

overview.short: Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib, officially Gurdwara Sri Darbar Sahib, is a gurdwara established by the fifth guru, Guru Arjan Dev, in the city of Tarn Taran Sahib, Punjab, India.
overview.description: Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib, officially Gurdwara Sri Darbar Sahib, is a gurdwara established by the fifth guru, Guru Arjan Dev, in the city of Tarn Taran Sahib, Punjab, India. The site has the distinction of having the largest sarovar (water pond) of all the gurdwaras. It is famous for the monthly gathering of pilgrims on the day of Amavas (a no-moon night). It is near Harmandir Sahib, Amritsar.

topPlaces.name: Tarn Taran Sahib
topPlaces.description: Tarn Taran Sahib is a city in the Majha region of the state of Punjab, India. It is the district headquarters and hosts the municipal council of Tarn Taran district.

topPlaces.name: Banwalipur
topPlaces.description: Banwalipur is a village in Kapurthala district of Punjab State, India. It is located 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) from Kapurthala, which is both district and sub-district headquarters of Banwalipur.

topPlaces.name: Behlolpur, Kapurthala
topPlaces.description: Behlolpur is a village in Kapurthala district of Punjab State, India. It is located 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) from Kapurthala, which is both district and sub-district headquarters of Behlolpur.

topPlaces.name: Mugal Chak
topPlaces.description: Mugal Chak is a village in Kapurthala district of Punjab State, India. It is located 25 kilometres (16 mi) from Kapurthala, which is both district and sub-district headquarters of Mugal Chak.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar (31 km) and the nearest railway station is Amritsar Junction (21 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib?
faq.a: Stays in Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gurdwara Sri Tarn Taran Sahib?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tarn Taran Sahib, Banwalipur, Behlolpur, Kapurthala, Mugal Chak.
